title: RemoteAgent
description: A resource that invokes a remote federated agent via the UAF protocol

urn.description: The URN identifying the remote agent. Format: urn:agent:authority/namespace:name@version#algorithm:hash

input.description: Input parameters to pass to the remote agent. Keys must match the agent's input schema.

timeout.description: Timeout duration for the remote invocation (e.g., '60s', '30s', '5m')

requireTrustLevel.description: Minimum required trust level for the remote agent

cacheSpec.description: If true, the remote agent's specification will be cached locally

fallback.description: List of fallback agents to try if the primary fails

timeout.description: Timeout for this fallback agent (overrides main timeout)
